metadata.title: The First Hundred Days
metadata.description: Note on the first hundred days of parenthood.

metadata.title: Site Patch Notes: List
metadata.description: Introducing List: the snapshot of my thoughts on various topics.

metadata.title: Project Fiddlesticks Devlog #2
metadata.description: I refactored the combat loop mechanic, an essential component in my indie game Project Fiddlesticks.

metadata.title: Books Read in 2025
metadata.description: To justify my hobby of book buying, I started reading more books in 2025.

metadata.title: Do Lumière Citizen Dream of Painted Sheep?
metadata.description: Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 has the best narrative and soundtrack of the year. Months after seeing both endings, I still often recall those beautiful moments, and I can't stop wondering.

metadata.title: Site Patch Notes: 2025 Rewrite
metadata.description: The site has a new face as well as a new body, as it now has a long overdue frontpage and a code base rewritten from scratch.

metadata.title: The Smooth Journey Outshines the Highlights
metadata.description: I did not anticipate to play Metaphor: ReFantazio, yet despite each of its components overshadowed by other games, it may be my favorite game of the year.

metadata.title: Memorial of the First Step
metadata.description: I made a tribute long overdue to my first game development project.

metadata.title: Bitter Masterpiece
metadata.description: I appreciate GOTY winner Elden Ring's great design and polished gameplay, but I still have a mixed feeling after.

metadata.title: Project Fiddlesticks Devlog #1
metadata.description: In Project Fiddlestcks, my latest indie game project, I implemented a vision algorithm, trying to capture the classic Rogue experience.

metadata.title: Observation on Programming with AI
metadata.description: I reckoned getting familiar with AI coding tools is necessary, tried some, and to my surprise, I turned out to be quite optimistic.

metadata.title: Blogging and Digital Gardening in the Social Platform and Generative AI Era
metadata.description: I talk to myself about why bother writing at somewhere nobody comes.

metadata.title: A Redemption Three Years Later
metadata.description: CD PROJEKT RED made a promise about Night City, which they broke. Three years later they had another attempt, and to me, it was their redemption.

metadata.title: S14 Recap
metadata.description: I did not play a lot of league during 2024, but I had a few unforgettable moments nonetheless.

metadata.title: Thoughts on Building a Game with XState
metadata.description: After hearing about XState's good reputation for years, I used it to build the prototype for my game. These are my thoughts.

metadata.title: Under the Hood: Diablo II Item Generation
metadata.description: A system design research turned into a reconciliation with a game I didn't know I was so in love with, so I wrote a research note to express my appreciation.

metadata.title: Site Patch Notes: 2024 Redesign
metadata.description: The 2024 redesign is finally here! I went on a journey of learning editorial design, and did an overhaul to this site's design, both functionality-wise and visual-wise.

metadata.title: A Peek of the World
metadata.description: I went to Copenhagen and London for my honeymoon, the first trip to Europe in my life. Some memories keep staying on my mind and I have many thoughts about them.

metadata.title: Godot Essentials
metadata.description: The biggest lessons I learned in my first Godot project.

metadata.title: 4 Years Reflection
metadata.description: Another two years of life as a full-time developer has passed. Many things changed and many lessons learned. It's a perfect timing to look back and reflect.

metadata.title: Improving Greatness
metadata.description: Tears of the Kingdom is built on the foundation of one of the most impactful game in last decade. Yet Nintendo did not settle, but managed to present a more polished world.

metadata.title: S13 Recap
metadata.description: After a three years gap, I'm back to league.

metadata.title: Refactor Blog 2023: Markdown Based Content
metadata.description: Embracing a different approach toward my own data, I made a change to the content hosting method of my blog.

metadata.title: Next.js App Font Not Loaded on Remote Machine Issue
metadata.description: Debugging note of a source loading issue that never reproduces on the dev machine.

metadata.title: First Game Jam Postmortem
metadata.description: I attended a game jam for the first time in my life. It was the best decision I made as an indie game developer in many years.

metadata.title: God of War Ragnarök
metadata.description: As a successor of a game with solid gameplay and extraordinary narrative, God of War Ragnarök made attempts to be something better on many aspects. Some of them were great, some others were not.

metadata.title: Dark Souls
metadata.description: Though once a cult classic, the soul-like has become a mainstream genre. I beat its early entry to see its secrets and the reputation of unmerciful difficulty.

metadata.title: 2 Years Reflection
metadata.description: Two years has passed since I started working as a front-end developer, the profession I dreamed and chased for.

metadata.title: Ghost of Tsushima
metadata.description: The island of Tsushima in Kamakura period created by Sucker Punch was authentic and full of surprises, and they made sure the immersion works well.

metadata.title: God of War (2018)
metadata.description: Like the developers, Kratos entered a new stage of his life, and the lessons he learned are beautifully written and shown in a masterpiece of narrative.

metadata.title: Hades
metadata.description: I gave the acclaimed hack and slash roguelike a try, and it became one of the best game I've ever played.

metadata.title: 森保まどか
metadata.description: 我見證了一段圓滿偶像生涯的結束，也有幸經驗了我所知最圓滿的偶像宅的退隱。

metadata.title: Refactor Blog: (3) Headless CMS
metadata.description: In the final step of the annual blog refactoring, I introduced the usage of headless CMS.

metadata.title: Refactor Blog: (2) SSR
metadata.description: After the Webpack setup for this site, I also implemented server-side-rendering from scratch.

metadata.title: Immortal
metadata.description: "Immortal" 有數種含義，我藉由一則 league 的軼聞對其中一種含義得到更多理解。

metadata.title: Refactor Blog: (1) Webpack
metadata.description: In this year's annual blog refactoring, I withdrew from using boilerplate build tools and configured Webpack myself.

metadata.title: Full-Screen Scroll
metadata.description: Research notes of implementing full-screen scroll animation.

metadata.title: S10 Recap
metadata.description: Season 10 was the most eventful league season for me, as I witnessed the rise and fall of a successful team as part of it.

metadata.title: Unity Dev Memo (2)
metadata.description: 關於 Unity3D 內 raycast 的研究筆記。

metadata.title: Celeste
metadata.description: 「如何面對失敗」是人生重要的課題之一，而 Celeste 以極為優秀的敘事結合遊戲玩法做出了漂亮的回答。

metadata.title: A Taste of Competitive Gaming
metadata.description: Thanks to Clash, I got to have a taste of playing organized League of Legends, and it felt amazing.

metadata.title: Use npm Package Commands in Fish Shell
Frostpunk
metadata.description: Frostpunk 是另一個以道德窘境逼迫玩家做出選擇為主體的作品，但當情況不再危急，道德也就不受挑戰了。

metadata.title: Red Dead Redemption 2
metadata.description: RDR2 細火慢燉地讓玩家見證兩名牛仔的人生起伏，鮮有激情，更多無奈與身不由己。

metadata.title: Unity Dev Memo (1)
metadata.description: 關於 Unity3D 物體移動，腳本執行順序以及 Hitbox 的筆記。

metadata.title: S9 Recap
metadata.description: 第一次現場觀看 MSI 以及 LCS，又換路換到 AD，第九季確實是立下許多里程碑的一個賽季。

metadata.title: City of Stars
metadata.description: 去了一趟夢想之都，不為了追夢，但仍然得到許多反思。

metadata.title: Things I Learned After Building 5 React.js Apps
Download Progress Tool in Terminal Using Node.JS
A Rather Easy Way to Implement Quicksort in JavaScript
metadata.description: My attempt to implement quicksort.

metadata.title: Devotion
metadata.description: 還願說了一個好故事，並藉由優秀的遊戲製作來凸顯其優勢。

metadata.title: Zelda: Breath of the Wild
metadata.description: 荒野之息是史上最優秀的開放世界遊戲，但荒野並不是我最喜愛的遊戲元素之一。

metadata.title: 淺談劇場
metadata.description: 對 HKT48 至今四個劇場的感想。

metadata.title: 所以，FEDC
metadata.description: 我逼著自己參加了遠超我當時程度的前端技術研討會，結果得到了遠超講題內容的收穫。

metadata.title: Dev Diary: Aura
metadata.description: 我嘗試了自己設計並實裝靈氣系統。它也許不顯眼，但絕不簡單。

metadata.title: Day of Destiny
metadata.description: 在歷經五年十個月以及一百一十四場公演之後，我迎來了偶像宅生涯的巔峰。

metadata.title: The Stone
metadata.description: Taliyah 是我近來最喜愛的角色之一，而一切冥冥之中早已注定。

metadata.title: Spring Finals
metadata.description: TSM第五度奪下NA LCS冠軍，我對他們抱持著高度期待。

metadata.title: Farewell, Battle.Net
metadata.description: 當我重新審視自己與剛畫下休止符的 Battle.Net 走過的足跡，才發現自己見證並參與了歷史。

metadata.title: 卒業
metadata.description: 人生中充滿悲歡離合，而我不禁讚嘆日文如何描述離別，以及其中的美麗。

metadata.title: ジブリ
metadata.description: 我進行了一次遲來的吉卜力補習，認識了許多我喜歡以及不喜歡的作品。

metadata.title: 耳を澄ませば
metadata.description: 我做了一個夢，夢裡我回到了學生時代，還抱著寫作的夢想。

metadata.title: この町が、まどかを育ててた
metadata.description: 一時興起，去了一趟長崎，那個把まどか養育成人的城市。

metadata.title: Road to plat
metadata.description: 歷時六年，在漂泊到第三個伺服器之後，我終於達成了曾一度放棄過的目標。
